title: matricaria anthemoides
intro: Matricaria anthemoides, also known as lemon chamomile or German chamomile, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which make it useful in treating digestive issues, insomnia, and anxiety. The health benefits of Matricaria anthemoides include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps, headaches, and skin irritations. Matricaria anthemoides can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used internally to support overall well-being and promote a restful night's sleep.
